name: @sdkwork/aiot-backend-sdk
description: SDKWork AIoT backend API generated SDK boundary.

scripts.generate: node ../../../tools/run-sdkgen.mjs generate -i ../../../apis/backend-api/iot/sdkwork-aiot-backend-api.openapi.json -o generated/server-openapi -n sdkwork-aiot-backend-sdk -t backend -l typescript --package-name "@sdkwork/aiot-backend-sdk" --api-prefix "/backend/v3/api" --sdk-version 0.1.0 --standard-profile sdkwork-v3
